closure_notes: Operator closed atlas PRD-001 on 2026-05-08 by accepting all 4 pending smoke entries as permanent won't-do caveats: t047 HTML print preview, t048 host-frame visual smoke, live_walkthrough, bundle_cap_dod5. Final status remains shipped_with_caveats per the smoke gate (skipped smoke is itself a caveat). PRD-000 (atlas core) remains shipped via its own PR; PRD-001 (Snapshot Export) ships behind the host-frame untested. If a future revival needs the smoke gates discharged, see individual entry notes for what's required (host URL, POC re-spin, bundle re-measurement). Code is on branch prd-001 at https://github.com/Chris1415/Sitecore.Plugin.Component-Usage-Atlas.git.

extension_points.note: Already registered with PRD-000 (per ADR-0004 + ADR-0007). PRD-001 adds no new extension points (NFR-7.1).
Already registered with PRD-000. PRD-001 adds no new extension points (NFR-7.1).

values: Atlas Snapshot Export — download/export reports & views from Component Usage Atlas widget + panel surfaces; user-framed jobs: see changes over time, export, share, use elsewhere; modeled on Pageshot's download mechanism but client-side only (no server); JSON + CSV + HTML formats with HTML doubling as PDF route via browser print dialog

stage_history.note: Full discovery (no brain-dump). Round 1: scope + format + 'over time' semantics + trigger placement (5 questions). Round 2: data depth + PDF rendering strategy + PII + filename convention + collection scope (6 questions). All Q&A folded into PRD.

PRD-001 + prd-minimal-001 written. Critical review (Light) ran in fresh subagent; surfaced 5 blockers. Stakeholder approved 'follow the suggested approach'. All 5 edits applied: (1) PRD-000 OS-15 supersession recorded in PRD-001 § 5 + back-reference in PRD-000 OS-15 + ADR-0015. (2) Language scope clarified via new IS-19 + JSON top-level languages_scanned + HTML/CSV summary surface. (3) Refresh-in-progress button stays enabled, exports previous atlas with previous scan_timestamp (AC-1.1, AC-2.1). (4) FR-1.1/FR-1.2/AC-2.7 reconciled via ADR-0016 (construction is pure; surfaceContext is click-time clone; no singleton re-read mid-construction). (5) Tenant-name fallback unified to tenant-<last-7-of-tenantId> across AC-1.4, § 9.1, § 9.4.

Minimal track — no architecture-<timestamp>.md file produced; canonical_artifacts.architecture stays null. Four ADRs added: ADR-0017 (iframe download mechanism + fallback hierarchy F1/F2/F3; spike codified as T001 of /task-breakdown), ADR-0018 (no client-side PDF library; HTML+browser-print is the only PDF route in v1), ADR-0019 (export schema versioning policy; ATLAS_EXPORT_SCHEMA_VERSION constant lives in single file src/atlas/export/schema-version.ts; exhaustive bump rules), ADR-0020 (tenant identity resolution via application.context.resourceAccess[0].tenantName — corrects PRD shorthand to match SDK shape verified against node_modules/@sitecore-marketplace-sdk/core/dist/shared-types.d.ts:69-79; new requireTenantIdentity helper in core/tenant-identity.ts). prd-minimal-001 refreshed with ADR 0017-0020 references + module location confirmed under src/atlas/export/. Extension points unchanged from PRD-000.

Single proposal, divergence=subtle. Named direction 'Quiet Affordance'. Spec at ui-design/ui-design-20260503T101441Z-v1.md — Blok primitives cited by registry slug + line numbers in existing project; HTML print stylesheet fully spec'd with canonical hex mapping derived from Blok tokens; WCAG 2.1 AA verified (8.93:1 partial-scan badge AAA). Four committed Team Lead decisions encoded verbatim: Blok dropdown menu picker / two-variant failure toast (sandbox-blocked adds Copy JSON to clipboard per ADR-0017 F2) / Blok body tokens at 11pt for print / tiered size estimate <5MB-none / 5-50MB-muted / >=50MB-warning. POC at pocs/poc-v1/ with 17 frames including 3 distinct per-format success-toast destinations (no collapsed 'menu opens' frame; PRD-000 S10 lesson applied). Previous PRD-000 POC archived to pocs/poc-v1-prd000-archive/. New OQs surfaced: OQ-UI-1 @blok/sonner not yet installed (lead dev to add via shadcn add); OQ-UI-2 atlas size-estimate perf heuristic (lead dev benchmarks); OQ-UI-3 panel button vs skipped-link warning visual cluster (lead dev empowered to insert separator without re-spec); OQ-UI-4 Why? popover copy depends on ADR-0013 evolution. POC pre-existing token gaps: --shadow-popover aliased to --shadow-md; --color-sonner-success derived from --color-success-background — both flagged for the lead developer.

Task breakdown at plans/task-breakdown-20260503T101441Z.md (1210 lines, 50 tasks T001-T050 across 6 epics: E1 Spike+foundation / E2 Pure construction core / E3 Format adapters / E4 Download trigger+failure detection / E5 Surface integrations / E6 Tests+verification). T001 = ADR-0017 iframe-download verification spike with Depends on=none — runs against real Cloud Portal install on both extension points before any T002+ proceeds; non-success forks plan into F1/F2/F3 fallback engineering branch (R-S1 in § 7). T002 = @blok/sonner install via shadcn registry. § 4c all 7 subsections filled (4c-7 = 'N/A — greenfield'); § 4c-3 cites Marketplace Client-Side scaffold posture per ADR-0007, npm + vitest + jsdom + all CI scripts; § 4c-4 names pocs/poc-v1/ as visual source of truth; § 4c-6 cites .d.ts paths inline (sdk-types.d.ts:236-240, shared-types.d.ts:128-146 + 69-79) per 40-sdk-contracts.mdc. Module location chosen: core/atlas/export/ (project has no src/ prefix; sibling to existing core/ business-logic modules). § 5 has explicit numbered Execution order T001-T050 + 23 parallel groups identified. Sections 9 (TDD contract) and 10 (per-task tests) stubbed for QA Specialist 07. Two gaps flagged for upstream: R-S2 ADR-0019 path-string drift (cites src/atlas/export/schema-version.ts; actual path is core/atlas/export/schema-version.ts — defer ADR amendment to /document) and OQ-UI-2 size-estimator perf heuristic (developer-time benchmark on 50k-page atlas — flagged for QA verification).

QA enriched task-breakdown-20260503T101441Z.md in place (no pre-QA snapshot per command discretion — interactive review). § 9 TDD contract authored: RED→GREEN→REFACTOR mandate; 7-row per-layer rules table (pure / DOM / clipboard / React / surface integrations / telemetry / schema-stability / a11y); runtime contrast assertion rule (§ 9.3) with @/lib/contrast.ts helper requirement defending against Blok Nova --primary-foreground collapse; SDK fixture provenance rule (§ 9.4) requiring `// source: node_modules/@sitecore-marketplace-sdk/core/dist/shared-types.d.ts:69-79, 128-146` comment at fixture-file top; DoD audit gates (DoD-3/5/7/8/9) tied to specific Task IDs; non-TDD applicability table (§ 9.6) preserves LD ordering for T001 spike, T002 install, T003 token provisioning, T004 SoT constant, T031 thin helpers, T034 popover, T035 toast helpers, T042–T050 audits/manual; marketplace UI visual smoke gate (§ 9.7) per sitecore:marketplace-sdk-host-frame-testing invariants; no-trivial-tests rule (§ 9.8) flagging tautologies + lone toHaveClass + provenance-less SDK fixtures as CR-blockers. § 10 per-task spec: 50 entries (one per Task ID); breakdown by test type — 25 unit (T005-T030 RED+GREEN pairs), 4 UI (T032/T033/T038/T039), 4 integration (T036/T037/T040/T041 + T042 + T049), 6 manual-gate (T001/T002/T003/T044/T047/T048/T050), 3 audit (T004/T043/T045), 2 non-TDD-marker (T031/T034/T035 inline notes). Depends on rewired for test-first ordering on 14 impl/test pairs: T005↔T006, T007↔T008, T009↔T010, T011↔T012, T013↔T014, T015↔T016, T017↔T018, T019↔T020, T021↔T022, T023↔T024, T025↔T026, T027↔T028, T029↔T030, T032↔T038, T033↔T039, T036↔T040, T037↔T041 (RED test now precedes GREEN impl in every pair). § 5 Execution Order rewritten to a valid topological sort; Parallel groups updated to 27 groups with explicit RED→GREEN sequencing. § 4b strengthened with Task ID links and gap-analysis additions covering AC-1.6 / AC-2.7 / AC-4.4 / AC-5.3 / IS-13 / IS-14 / IS-17 / IS-18 / R4 / R6. § 4c surgical extensions: § 4c-3 added @/lib/contrast.ts helper; § 4c-4 enumerated POC frame paths used in T040/T041/T047/T048 tests. Manifest task_breakdown_style was already 'tdd' (set by LD upfront); no flip required. canonical_artifacts.qa_report stays null — single test contract is the enriched task breakdown. canonical_artifacts.task_breakdown_pre_qa stays null — interactive run, git history is the comparison source.

Pipeline implementation completed across 8 Developer batches over a multi-day run with one architectural fork mid-stream. Foundation T002-T008 (sonner install, token gaps aliased, schema-version SoT, tenant-identity + telemetry RED-GREEN). Core construction T009-T020 (SurfaceContext / header / filename / size-estimator / build-export / JSON adapter). Format adapters T021-T028 (CSV 253 LOC + HTML 264 LOC, both ≤300 cap; trigger-download + detect-failure for ADR-0017 § Primary mechanism). Pageshot hooks T051-T056 (useSaveExport / useOpenExport / useCopyExport per ADR-0021). Surface components T031/T032/T033/T034/T035/T038/T039 (telemetry helpers, action cluster, format picker, why popover, toast helpers + lib/contrast.ts helper for § 9.3 runtime contrast rule). Surface wiring T036/T037/T040/T041 (widget + panel integrations; AC-2.7 mid-navigation click-time-clone test passes). Verification T042-T050 (schema-stability, DoD-7 grep audit, antimetric extension, telemetry distribution, empty-state, full ci). Test count 38 files / 255 tests baseline → 61 files / 463 tests (+208 tests). All gates green: typecheck, lint (only pre-existing 4 warnings), test 463/463, build, audit:network, check:antimetrics, check:schema-version (NEW), npm run ci. Mid-run architectural fork: T001 spike returned silent_block on both extension points (downloads forbidden by Marketplace iframe sandbox per platform constraint). User confirmed known limitation; recommended pageshot-pattern adoption. ADR-0017 amended to point at ADR-0021; ADR-0021 written for three-action egress (Save + Open + Copy); PRD-001 Amendment 1; prd-minimal-001 + task breakdown surgically amended (added T001a cleanup, T051-T056 hooks; reshaped T032/T036/T037/T040/T041; § 4c-4 egress note). T029/T030 fallbackClipboard superseded by T056 useCopyExport. ESCALATION (open): bundle delta cumulative measured ~37.9 KB gzipped vs 20 KB cap (NFR-1.4 / DoD-5) — measurement is approximate (file-summing × ratio), and ADR-0021's three-action pattern is structurally heavier than original single-Download concept. Two paths: re-measure with next-bundle-analyzer, or amend NFR-1.4 via /document. T047/T048 manual gates deferred to /test (HTML print-preview + host-frame visual smoke). Branch prd-001; remote https://github.com/Chris1415/Sitecore.Plugin.Component-Usage-Atlas.git; ready for /code-review.

Critical code review of PRD-001 implementation. Originally spawned to a sub-agent; sub-agent exhausted budget mid-review (71 tool calls, 524s). Team Lead resumed inline and produced the report at plans/code-review-20260505T064100Z.md. Findings: 0 critical, 0 major, 3 minor. Minor 1+2: html.ts:83-94 print-stylesheet citations cite stale globals.css line numbers (tokens migrated to L497-549 block); hex values are alpha-resolution approximations rather than exact; visual quality unaffected, doc accuracy issue only. Minor 3: bundle-cap escalation already known from T044 (~37.9KB gzipped vs 20KB cap; flagged for /document or NFR-1.4 amendment). All ADR compliance verified (0002/0003/0009/0010/0013/0016/0017/0019/0020/0021). SDK contract greps: zero new client.mutate sites; all pre-existing PRD-000 sites compliant. DoD-7 schema-version SoT audit passes via new npm run check:schema-version script. Test count unchanged (no fixes applied — minor findings deferred to user). All CI gates green: typecheck, lint (4 pre-existing warnings), test 463/463, build, audit:network, audit:anti-metric, check:schema-version, npm run ci end-to-end. Overall assessment: PASS. Recommend proceed to /test.

Comprehensive test pass for PRD-001. Run inline by Team Lead (sub-agent budget reserved for /document). Automated checks (Phase 1b): full npm run ci passes — 463/463 tests across 61 files; lint clean (4 pre-existing warnings); typecheck clean; build succeeds (Next 16.1.7 Turbopack, 6 static routes); audit:network OK; audit:anti-metric OK; check:schema-version OK. Manual verification (Phase 1c): every AC from US-1..US-5 mapped to verified Task IDs. Load-bearing AC-2.7 click-time clone test passes (panel-surface-export.test.tsx case g). DoD-3 schema byte-identity (T042), DoD-7 SoT audit (T043), DoD-8 empty-state (T049), DoD-9 telemetry distribution (T046) all verified. Visual testing (Phase 1d): host URL not supplied — Marketplace host-frame visual smoke (T048) deferred as WARN-level entry per command rule (no silent skip). T047 HTML print preview also deferred (manual gate, multi-browser). Live walkthrough deferred — mandatory before shipped status. Phase 2 fixes: 0 critical / 0 major findings to fix; 3 minor findings carried from /code-review remain open for user decision. Status transition: per command rule (platform_target=marketplace AND any smoke_outcomes pending), set to tested_pending_smoke. smoke_outcomes populated with 4 entries: t047_html_print_preview (pending), t048_host_frame_smoke (pending), live_walkthrough (pending), bundle_cap_dod5 (pending — DoD-5 escalation). Test report at plans/test-report-20260505T065000Z.md. Overall result: PASS WITH CAVEATS (manual gates deferred). Recommend proceed to /document.

/document run inline. Updated 4 files: CHANGELOG.md (added [Unreleased — PRD-001] entry above the existing PRD-000 block — Added/Changed/Deferred/Dogfood subsections); README.md (added PRD-001 paragraph to 'What this does' section, removed hardcoded test counts per dogfood rule, expanded project-structure tree with the new export module layout under core/atlas/export/); docs/architecture.md (added 'Atlas Snapshot Export (PRD-001)' major section — module shape + ADR-0016 purity + three-action egress per ADR-0021 + telemetry); docs/decisions.md (added 'Snapshot Export' theme group with all 7 new ADRs 0015-0021 + 'Sitecore' meta-grouping). All updates preserved existing content; no overwrites. POC re-spin / new screenshots deferred to post-walkthrough polish (existing screenshots show pre-fork single-Download UX). Recommend proceed to /ship after live walkthrough lands smoke_outcomes.

Ship report at plans/ship-report-20260505T070000Z.md. Status forced to shipped_with_caveats by the smoke-outcomes gate (4 pending entries: t047_html_print_preview, t048_host_frame_smoke, live_walkthrough, bundle_cap_dod5). 6 deferred items (D-1..D-6) documented; 5 known limitations; ADR compliance table covers all 21 ADRs (0001-0021) — ADR-0017 marked 'superseded in part' by ADR-0021; ADR-0021 marked 'compliant with one in-flight amendment' (the noopener-null false-positive auto-revert change to useOpenExport during live UX smoke). Test coverage: 463 tests across 61 files; all CI gates green incl. new check:schema-version. Friction-log § 9 reflects narrative-form log; no Skill patch suggestion: entries surfaced — skill-patch sub-pass disposition vacuous. UX live-test feedback during this session yielded 5 in-flight UX fixes that landed cleanly (format-picker disabled-state, Save tooltip on disabled with refined copy, Open auto-revert for noopener-null false positive, '16 other pages' counter bug fix using distinct pageIds, format-active indicator with check icon + uppercase trigger label). Cloud Portal extension-point check (step 19): not-applicable — PRD-001 added no new extension points; both surfaces inherited from PRD-000 registration.

attempt_1_F0.mechanism: Blob + URL.createObjectURL + synthetic <a download> + click + revoke
attempt_1_F0.evidence: User confirmed both [CUA-SPIKE] runDownloadSpike fired AND [CUA-SPIKE] a.click() returned console.info logs appear; no save dialog; no file in Downloads; no console error. Handler executes, sandbox silently swallows the download. User clarified: 'downloads are forbidden — known limitation in permissions' (Marketplace iframe sandbox omits allow-downloads).

fork_decision.rationale: Pageshot ships and works in the same iframe context — see products/pageshot/site/next-app/components/use-open-image.ts:7-15 and use-copy-image.ts. Mirror the proven pattern instead of cascading single-mechanism spikes.
fork_decision.supersedes_part: ADR-0017 (F1/F2/F3 cascade + hard-fail toast removed; Save mechanism specification preserved)
fork_decision.f2_copy_evidence: Inherited from products/pageshot/site/next-app/components/use-copy-image.ts:128 — production-proven navigator.clipboard.write([new ClipboardItem(...)]). Atlas variant uses navigator.clipboard.writeText for JSON/CSV (text); ClipboardItem with text/html + text/plain peers for HTML.

t047_html_print_preview.description: DoD-4: HTML output renders cleanly in print preview on Chromium + Firefox + Safari at A4 + Letter paper sizes. Manual gate; reference is pocs/poc-v1/html-output-sample.html.
t047_html_print_preview.notes: WONT-DO 2026-05-08 — operator closed atlas PRD-001 with smoke caveats permanently accepted. Print preview was never walked; HTML output sample exists at pocs/poc-v1/html-output-sample.html if a future revival needs it.

t048_host_frame_smoke.description: Per sitecore:marketplace-sdk-host-frame-testing — clipped iframe screenshots on widget + panel surfaces, compared against pocs/poc-v1/ on the five axes (layout, typography, color, component anatomy, state fidelity).
t048_host_frame_smoke.notes: WONT-DO 2026-05-08 — operator closed atlas PRD-001 with smoke caveats permanently accepted. Compounding blockers: host URL never supplied AND POC re-spin needed (pocs/poc-v1/ shows pre-fork single-Download UX, not the three-action egress per ADR-0021). Future revival would need both live render + POC frame regeneration for the action-cluster shape.

live_walkthrough.description: Per /test § 1d-i.8: drive the installed app for ≥5 minutes as a real editor. Click every primary CTA + format/action combination; trigger every drawer/modal; verify list-of-renderings behavior past 20 items.
live_walkthrough.notes: WONT-DO 2026-05-08 — operator closed atlas PRD-001 with smoke caveats permanently accepted. Ship gate forces shipped_with_caveats (skipped smoke is itself a caveat); operator accepts the wider untested surface as a permanent caveat rather than chasing the host-frame session.

bundle_cap_dod5.description: DoD-5 / NFR-1.4: cumulative gzipped delta ≤20 KB vs PRD-000 baseline. Currently estimated ~37.9 KB feature-attributable (file-summing × 35% compression ratio — coarse measurement).
bundle_cap_dod5.notes: WONT-DO 2026-05-08 — operator closed atlas PRD-001 with smoke caveats permanently accepted. Cap was set pre-ADR-0021 fork; the three-action egress is structurally heavier than the original single-Download. NFR-1.4 stands as documentation of the original target but is not enforced for this PRD; future PRD revisions can re-measure with next-bundle-analyzer or amend the NFR formally.

notes: PRD-001 = first feature PRD on top of PRD-000 holistic baseline (PRD-000 ran 2026-04-27 to 2026-04-30, shipped_with_caveats 2026-04-28).

Branch prd-001 was created from prd-000 (not main) because main does not yet contain PRD-000's work — PRD-000 PR (https://github.com/Chris1415/Sitecore.Plugin.Component-Usage-Atlas/pull/new/prd-000) was still pending at the start of this run. Rebase onto merged main once PRD-000 lands.
discovery: completed (Round 1 + Round 2; full discovery, no brain-dump).
critical_review: completed (Light, single round; 5 blockers surfaced; stakeholder approved all 5 suggested edits).

ADRs introduced by /create-prd: ADR-0015 (export-as-v1-feature, supersedes PRD-000 OS-15), ADR-0016 (export construction is pure / surfaceContext is click-time clone — captures the FR-1.1 / AC-2.7 reconciliation surfaced in critical review).
PRD-000 OS-15 edited in place to carry the supersession back-reference. The export half is rescued; the sort-controls half remains deferred to Phase 2.

P0 verification spike for /architect: iframe sandbox download mechanism in xmc:dashboardblocks AND xmc:pages:context-panel (PRD-001 R1, OQ-1, § 9.5). Mechanism: Blob + URL.createObjectURL + synthetic <a download> + programmatic click + revoke. Spike must verify in real Cloud Portal install on both extension points; if blocked, propose fallback before implementation begins.

Sitecore-aware discovery: completed via marketplace-sdk-lifecycle skill. Confirmed feature is purely additive on existing 4a (iframe Mode A) — no new extension points, no new scopes, no Auth0 / PKCE changes.
Recommended next stage: /architect — Software Architect (04). Spike OQ-1 BEFORE the architecture blueprint is finalized so the architecture can incorporate the verified mechanism (or its fallback).

/architect (rerun after harsh interrupt): user picked minimal planning track. No architecture blueprint file produced; ADRs 0017-0020 capture the new fundamental decisions directly from PRD-001. SDK contract gate verified application.context shape against node_modules — surfaced PRD shorthand mismatch (tenantName lives at resourceAccess[0].tenantName, not top-level), captured in ADR-0020. Iframe download spike (R1/OQ-1) deferred to T001 of /task-breakdown per ADR-0017 — runs first, real Cloud Portal install, both extension points; F1/F2/F3 fallback chain pre-engineered.

UI design: single proposal locked as winner ('Quiet Affordance' direction); subtle divergence on shipped PRD-000 visual language. POC pocs/poc-v1/ has 17 frames + click-targets.md. POC pre-flagged token gaps for lead dev: --shadow-popover (aliased), --color-sonner-success (derived). New OQs: @blok/sonner install required at /task-breakdown (OQ-UI-1).

Lead Developer task breakdown: 50 tasks across 6 epics. T001 = ADR-0017 spike (depends_on=none) with hard-fork branch on non-success. Module location locked at core/atlas/export/ (no src/ prefix; sibling to existing core/ modules). Two upstream gaps flagged: R-S2 ADR-0019 path-string drift defers to /document; OQ-UI-2 size-estimator perf benchmark passed to QA for verification.
Recommended next stage: QA Specialist (07) enrichment of task-breakdown-20260503T101441Z.md in place — adds § 9 TDD contract + § 10 per-task tests + reorders Depends on for test-first.

QA enrichment 2026-05-03T14:30: task-breakdown-20260503T101441Z.md edited in place (no new file, no pre-QA snapshot). § 9 TDD contract + § 10 per-task specs (50 entries) authored. 17 RED/GREEN pairs rewired so RED tests precede impl. SDK fixture provenance rule + runtime contrast assertion rule encoded. § 5 Execution Order is a valid topological sort. § 4c extended with @/lib/contrast.ts helper + per-test POC frame citations. task_breakdown_style was already 'tdd' (LD set upfront); status moves plan_ready → qa_ready. Recommended next stage: /implement (Developer 08, pipeline mode against products/component-usage-atlas/site/ branch prd-001).

QA gaps surfaced for user awareness: (1) T034 Why? popover has no dedicated unit test — covered indirectly by T040/T041 sandbox-blocked branches; if popover regression risk surfaces, add why-popover.test.tsx; (2) T035 toast helpers have no dedicated test — covered at integration layer; (3) the Playwright-MCP `file://` toolchain gap for T048 host-frame smoke remains — substitute with `npx serve pocs/poc-v1/` until upstream fix; (4) the @/lib/contrast.ts helper is created Developer-time as part of T032 GREEN phase if absent — if Developer skips, T038 case (j) and T039 case (j) will need an alternative contrast implementation.

T001 SPIKE FAILED — silent_block on BOTH surfaces (xmc:dashboardblocks + xmc:pages:context-panel). 2026-05-04: F0 primary mechanism (Blob + synthetic <a download> + click) does NOT produce a download in the Marketplace iframe sandbox. Click handler fires (console.info logs confirmed before AND after a.click()), but no save dialog, no file, no error. Verdict: fork-to-F1 per ADR-0017. T002+ work BLOCKED until a working fallback is verified. Friction log download_smoke section populated; manifest smoke_outcomes.download_spike.attempt_1_F0 records the failure. ADR-0017 amendment will capture the chosen fallback before /code-review runs.

ARCHITECTURAL FORK 2026-05-04 — pageshot pattern adopted. User clarified F0 fail is a known platform-level permission limitation (iframe sandbox lacks allow-downloads). Investigation grepped products/pageshot/site/next-app/components/ — found production three-action egress pattern: useDownloadImage (canonical, kept future-proof), useOpenImage (window.open, primary in current sandbox), useCopyImage (clipboard, secondary). Atlas adopts the same pattern verbatim, adapted for text artifacts (JSON/CSV/HTML vs pageshot's binary PNG). ADR-0021 written; ADR-0017 superseded-in-part (Save mechanism preserved; F1/F2/F3 cascade + hard-fail toast removed; replaced with three parallel actions, all upfront-engineered, all user-visible). Save action ships disabled with tooltip until Sitecore platform adds allow-downloads. Open + Copy ship as primary working actions. Friction log download_smoke section captures the fork decision. Next: spec + plan amendments via sub-agent (PRD-001 Amendment 1, prd-minimal-001 update, surgical task-breakdown edits for new hooks + reshape E5).
